Nice place.
Clean bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación de servicio con todo lo que quieran, nafta, baños limpios, menú tienen sándwich, pevete muy rico recomendada, para parar y muy linda zona de campo muy verde todo, disfruten los que paran y están por parar.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice gas station with everything you could want: gas, clean restrooms, a menu with sandwiches, and a very tasty pevete (a type of Mexican sandwich). Highly recommended. A great place to stop, and a very nice, green countryside area. Enjoy those who are stopping and are about to stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtclpxQTBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gran lugar para parar.  Excelente atención, arboleda, baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Great place to stop. Excellent service, grove of trees, clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOFlyZldnEAE

reviews.comment:
Punto de reabastecimiento de combustible en ruta a Córdoba.  Atención cordial y un YPF Full completo

(Translated by Google)
Fueling station on the way to Córdoba. Friendly service and a fully stocked YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc2EzTjVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación del ACA en Tortugas.
Si van o vienen por la AU 9 Córdoba Rosario, y quieren cargar combustible y descansar, recomiendo esta estación.
Está  3 minutos de la autopista, lugar tranquilo, con arboleda y mesas para comer un refrigerio.
Tiene shop y minutas.

(Translated by Google)
A very good ACA station in Tortugas.

If you're traveling on or coming from the Córdoba-Rosario highway (AU 9) and want to fill up and rest, I recommend this station.
It's 3 minutes from the highway, a quiet place with trees and tables for a snack. It also has a convenience store and serves light meals.

reviewReply.comment: Edgardo muchas gracias por su visita a la estación.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM3Z6bTRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para parar un rato a tomar unos mates. Hay muchas mesas y muy buena sombra gratuitas para sentarse

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to stop for a while and have some mate. There are plenty of tables and great shade to sit in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOXF5S0pBEAE

reviews.comment:
se equivocaron y me cobraron a otro cliente. anularon la transacción por la aplicación de YPF, pero no anularon el cobro en la tarjeta de crédito....los llamo por teléfono y no responden. Si tienen otra vía de comunicación seria excelente

(Translated by Google)
They made a mistake and charged another customer. They canceled the transaction through the YPF app, but they didn't cancel the credit card charge. I called them, but they didn't answer. If you have another way to communicate, that would be excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURteG9LcG9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente. Es la única parada que realizo de Buenos Aires a Córdoba y viceversa. Combustible, café, y una pichona. Espacios arbolados con bancos y mesas y tachos de basura

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. It's the only stop I make on my way from Buenos Aires to Córdoba and back. Fuel, coffee, and a small bird. Shaded areas with benches, tables, and trash cans.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdW9qUC1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermosa estación, con espacio para parar a comer y estirar las piernas.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful station, with space to stop for lunch and stretch your legs.

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para hacer una parada camino a Córdoba. Tiene mesitas para pasar un rato y descansar. El combustible es de buena calidad.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop on the way to Córdoba. It has tables where you can relax for a while. The fuel is good quality.

reviews.comment:
El menú del día día tenía mal olor, y había una sola opción de los 6 que ofrecían. Así que tengan cuidado si van de paso y comen ahí!

(Translated by Google)
The daily menu smelled bad, and there was only one of the six options offered. So be careful if you're passing by and eat there!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURta0lYbnJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estacion cerca de la ruta 9 antes de Leones, lugar para sentarse a descansar con un mate, baños limpios, buena atencion, equipado y con poca gente, recomendable para hacer un break en el viaje

(Translated by Google)
Station near Route 9 before Leones, a place to sit and rest with a mate, clean bathrooms, good service, well-equipped and not crowded, recommended for a break during your trip
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtXzRpSjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La zona verde sigue muy linda para hacer parada en el viaje. Pero a diferencia de otras veces, el baño sucio y la zona de compras atendida por una sola persona, que también preparaba los desayunos, lo que lo hacía lentisimo. Lo que si muy buena predisposición

(Translated by Google)
The green area is still a lovely place to stop during your trip. However, unlike other times, the bathroom was dirty and the shopping area was staffed by only one person, who also prepared breakfast, making everything incredibly slow. On the other hand, the staff was very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMzZQMDJ3RRAB
